title: hypericum marginatum
intro: Hypericum marginatum, also known as the Narrow-leaved St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Hypericaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of hypericin and hyperforin compounds. The medicinal properties of Hypericum marginatum have been reported to provide health benefits such as wound healing, antiseptic effects, and relief from anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
